name: Golden Potato Medley
recipeIngredient: 3 medium potatoes, pared, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain the potato cubes and carrot slices.
2. Melt 1/4 cup margarine in a microwave-safe dish.
3. Add onion and green pepper to the melted margarine. Cook for 2-3 minutes until tender.
4. Blend in flour, then add milk. Stir well and cook in the microwave until thick. Remove from heat.
5. Add pimientos, salt, white pepper, and cheese. Mix thoroughly.
6. Transfer the cooked vegetables into a buttered 1.5-quart microwave-safe baking dish.
7. Pour the sauce over the vegetables and stir lightly.
8. Blend together dry bread crumbs and 1 tablespoon margarine. Sprinkle evenly over the casserole.
9. Microwave for 12-15 minutes, or bake in an oven preheated to 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes. The dish can be refrigerated later and baked for another 45-50 minutes if needed.
